response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video. 2. Identified the singing segment from 00:00 to 01:57, featuring Tsunomaki Watame. 3. Used on-screen text ('灰色の証明' and '作詞・作曲・編曲：岸田教団&THE明星ロケッツ') to identify the song and composer. 4. Transcribed the lyrics directly from the video. 5. Identified the talk segment/announcements from 01:57 to 05:00.055. 6. Corrected the final scene end time to match the video duration. 7. Constructed the JSON object based on the gathered information.
response.global_summary: Tsunomaki Watame performs her original song "灰色の証明" (Haiiro no Shoumei) and subsequently makes announcements regarding the release of her song as a book and her birthday merchandise lineup.

scenes.description: Tsunomaki Watame performs the song '灰色の証明'. The performance features dynamic lighting and stage mirrors. The song title and artist information are displayed on screen.
scenes.original_artist: 岸田教団&THE明星ロケッツ
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
綺麗なんかが勝ったわ
望むべくもない
華やかさも必要ない
それが私だから
歴史はいつだって
勝者が作るモノ
だけど記憶はその限りじゃない
今この時だけは
決断的な刹那性に
飛び込んでけ
灰色のしでえがく
私の思いが
美しき痛みをも
乗り越えて書き換えてく
後悔は1ミリもない
あるのは灼熱だけ
ただ自分の生命を蹴り上げるように
始まりは些細も早ってだっていい
突き動かされ指先を伸ばす
現実は残酷だと気付いていないわけじゃない
諦めるその時は
今ではなかったらしい
灰色の空 赤く染めて
もう一度転化して
ただ自分の生命を証明しよう
そこにいたことを刻むように
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The beauty that has won,
There is no hope for it.
No need for flamboyance,
Because that is who I am.
History is always made by the winners,
But memory is not limited to that.
Just for this moment,
Jump into the decisive moment.
Drawing the gray, my thoughts,
Overcome even the beautiful pain and rewrite it.
There is not a millimeter of regret,
All that is there is burning heat.
Just to kick up my own life.
Small beginnings are fine,
Moved, I stretch out my fingertips.
I am not unaware that reality is cruel.
The time to give up,
It seems it wasn't now.
Dyed the gray sky red,
Transform once again,
Just prove my own life,
As if to carve that I was there.

scenes.description: Tsunomaki Watame speaks to the audience, announces the release of her song '灰色の証明' as a book, and presents her birthday merchandise collection.
